betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§7§oWelcome to Chapter 10!

This is the end-game! You made it!

§fThe Lord of Gluttony. The Mission of one of the jailers of the dead.
It is mine now. My Mission.
No longer the Mission of the Meatball Man. No more a tyrant. A Lord. A Lord of the Undead. A subject of Death.
That is who I have become. 
What my True Name revealed. 
What the actions of the Meatball Man produced.
What the Arbiter prophesied.
What the Faithful Undead revealed.
The cycle, once broken is made whole once again. The Gluttonous Souls, sequestered from the Meatball Flesh.
The aspect of Hungering Flesh, cleansed.
The choice, to turn back, to betray, to forsake, now in my hands.
In my hands, just like this staff. The core of my power, the core of my mission.
An objective that can be followed. An objective that can be betrayed.
The way I am now, I cannot answer. All I have been through, it drained me of my humanity.
I need to wait, I need to recover. I need to make sense of a Truth that was dropped on me without preparation.
The actions of the Faithful Undead; I am thankful for what they did, but I have not processed it in full.
I know my True Name, but I do not know what it means. I have not gone through the journey of learning it myself, but if I am to undertake this Mission, my Mission for the rest of time, I must undertake it as I did with my old Name back on Gallifrey.
A new journey. One without a war. One just for myself.
For the Undead Lord of Gluttony.
